Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: Pressure points are emerging in global currency dynamics, particularly with the 'Iran war could give rise to the 'petroyuan'' challenging long-standing dollar dominance in oil trade. This shift could introduce new volatility and affect international liquidity flows.
Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: Regulatory coherence is under pressure as 'Fico threatens to veto new EU anti-Russian sanctions over Druzhba blocking,' indicating potential rifts in international policy responses.
